other_findings.finding: NK cells are annotated as a distinct immune cell state in the prenatal skin atlas based on high expression of KLRF1, NKG7, and GZMB.
NK cells are present in the integrated prenatal and adult skin dataset, appearing in the UMAP visualization as a distinct cluster among immune lineages.
Pre-dermal condensate cells co-located with dendritic and lymphoid cells (including NK cells) based on correlation analyses of microenvironments.
NK cells are enriched in the stromal region of adult tissue.

evidence_quotes.context: UMAP visualization labels for the integrated prenatal skin, adult skin and SkO datasets.

evidence_quotes.quote: Pre-dermal condensate (pre-Dc) cells co-located with dendritic and lymphoid cells based on correlation analyses.
evidence_quotes.context: NMF microenvironment analysis of prenatal skin.

evidence_quotes.quote: Top differentially expressed genes for NK cells: KLRF1, NKG7, GZMB, GNLY, KLRD1.
evidence_quotes.context: Marker gene table showing DE genes for each cluster.
